name: count_ge_threshold
py:
def count_ge_threshold(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is >= the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v >= k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: count_le_threshold
py:
def count_le_threshold(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value is <= the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v <= k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: sum_odd
py:
def sum_odd(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the values of reachable nodes whose value is odd."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += v if v % 2 == 1 else 0
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: count_div2or3
py:
def count_div2or3(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes divisible by 2 or 3."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v % 2 == 0 or v % 3 == 0: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: sum_abs
py:
def sum_abs(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Sum the absolute values of reachable nodes."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        acc += abs(v)
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: count_in_band
py:
def count_in_band(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes with value strictly between 0 and the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if 0 < v < k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: max_even
py:
def max_even(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the maximum even value reachable (or -1 if none)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; best = -1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if vals[n] % 2 == 0 and vals[n] > best: best = vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return best

name: count_single_child
py:
def count_single_child(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes that have exactly one child."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); kids = adj.get(n, [])
        if len(kids) == 1: acc += 1
        stack.extend(kids)
    return acc

name: product_positive
py:
def product_positive(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Multiply the positive values among reachable nodes (1 if none)."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; p = 1
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        if vals[n] > 0: p *= vals[n]
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return p

name: count_gt_double_threshold
py:
def count_gt_double_threshold(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count reachable nodes whose value exceeds twice the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; vals = spec["vals"]; start = spec["start"]; k = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n); v = vals[n]
        if v > 2 * k: acc += 1
        stack.extend(adj.get(n, []))
    return acc

name: count_heavy_edges
py:
def count_heavy_edges(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Count edges whose weight exceeds the threshold."""
    adj = spec["adj"]; start = spec["start"]; thr = spec["threshold"]
    seen = set(); stack = [start]; acc = 0
    while stack:
        n = stack.pop()
        if n in seen: continue
        seen.add(n)
        for tgt, w in adj.get(n, []):
            acc += 1 if w > thr else 0
            stack.append(tgt)
    return acc

name: last_chain
py:
def last_chain(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the last value in the chain (0 if empty)."""
    items = spec["items"]
    return items[-1] if items else 0

name: min_chain
py:
def min_chain(spec: dict) -> int:
    """Return the minimum value in the chain (0 if empty)."""
    items = spec["items"]
    return min(items) if items else 0
